title: Delete or rename my home account template (template)
excerpt:
Hello Everybody! 
Is there any solution to rename / and/or delete my “account saved home template” 
I Try to go to template center (model center), but there is definitely no options there

posts.author: senskill (Yann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everybody!
Is there any solution to rename / and/or delete my “account saved home template”
I Try to go to template center (model center), but there is definitely no options there

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @senskill

Thanks for your question.
Are you referring to a template you’ve saved in your account?
If so, to remove this you just need to navigate to the board that the template is created from.

Once on this board, you can remove it from your templates by selecting the three dot menu in the top right hand corner.
From here you can select ‘More actions’ > ‘Remove from templates’

image1086×430 50.6 KB

Hope this helps!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
